name: EqualWeb
description: EqualWeb — Accessibility / A11y Testing tool for developers

seo.title: EqualWeb — Accessibility / A11y Testing
seo.meta_description: EqualWeb: EqualWeb — Accessibility / A11y Testing tool for developers

when_to_use: One-line widget overlay adding a11y toolbar to existing site
ADA compliance layer added to legacy CMS without rebuild
Accessibility statement page auto-generated for legal coverage
WCAG 2.1 issue scanning across entire domain
Contrast and font-size adjustments surfaced to end users

pros: Combines scanning, overlay and expert remediation
Broad language coverage for international sites
Integrations with CMSs and ecommerce platforms
cons: Overlay widget approach is controversial in a11y community
Overlays don't fix underlying WCAG issues
Legal defense value of overlays is disputed
review.verdict: Overlay-first vendor with real audit services bolted on, but the a11y community remains critical of the core approach.
review.best_for: Teams wanting a quick compliance story layered over an audit workflow.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Monthly subscription, no evidence of peak-lock
